# Carpenterwala - Professional Handyman & Home Services Marketplace

> Carpenterwala is Bangalore's leading verified handyman marketplace connecting homeowners and property managers with background-checked carpenters, painters, electricians, and plumbers.

## Core Services
- [Carpentry Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/carpentry): Custom furniture assembly, modular kitchen fitting, door lock installation, wardrobe repairs.
- [Painting Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/painting): Interior and exterior wall painting, texture design, waterproofing, stencil work.
- [Electrical Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/electrical): Wiring, short-circuit fixes, MCB replacement, chandelier & appliance fitting.
- [Plumbing Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/plumbing): Tap leakage repair, pipe fitting, water heater installation, bathroom sanitary fixes.

## Interactive Tools & Calculators
- [Paint Cost & Quantity Calculator](https://carpenterwala.com/services/painting#calculator): Estimates wall painting square footage, primer requirement, litres of paint, and labor costs for 1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK flats.
- [Water Wastage & Tap Drip Calculator](https://carpenterwala.com/services/plumbing#calculator): Calculates daily and monthly water loss (in litres and ₹ Rupees) caused by leaking taps, flush tanks, and pipes in Indian households.
- [Electricity Wastage & Bill Calculator](https://carpenterwala.com/services/electrical#calculator): Estimates monthly kWh power consumption, electrical wastage, and electricity bill impacts for high-power home appliances (ACs, geysers, refrigerators, microwaves).

## Coverage & Service Hubs (Bangalore)
- Koramangala (560034)
- Indiranagar (560038)
- Whitefield (560066)
- HSR Layout (560102)
- Thanisandra / North Bangalore (560077)
